files.pageDescription: Browse and manage the files you have uploaded
files.listEmpty: You have not uploaded any files yet
files.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this file? This action cannot be undone.
files.file-list-load-error: Failed to load the file list
files.file-not-found: The requested file was not found
files.file-access-private: You do not have permission to access this private file
files.file-delete-not-owner: Only the file owner can delete this file
files.file-physical-missing: The file content could not be found on the server
files.backendTimeout: The backend did not respond in time, please try again
files.unknownError: An unknown error occurred, please try again
files.uploadFormDescription: Select a file from your device to upload it to your account
files.uploadDropZone: Drop a file here, or click to select
files.file-upload-read-error: Failed to read the uploaded file
files.file-upload-file-too-large: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size
files.file-upload-quota-file-count: You have reached the maximum number of files allowed
files.file-upload-quota-storage: You have reached your total storage quota
files.file-upload-missing-write-role: You need the ROLE_FILE_WRITE permission to upload public or connected files
files.file-upload-storage-error: Server could not prepare the storage directory
files.file-upload-write-error: Server could not write the file to disk
files.file-upload-signature-error: Server could not compute the file integrity signature
